title: Latitude 28° Global Platinum Mastercard Alternative
body: So I've had this card for many years only for traveling, but they now have a monthly fee, which is not really worth it for me since i only use it for travelling overseas like once or twice a year. Suggestions for alternatives, similar or better? I don't want monthly/yearly fees, I don't want terms and conditions like spend $X amount and then you dont pay a fee! Thanks!
